content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "坐過站了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "不好意思，我好像坐過站了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zuò guò zhàn le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zuo4 guo4 zhan4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I think I missed my stop.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 제가 정류장을 지나친 것 같아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒關係，下一站是台北車站，你要在那裡下車嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, xià yī zhàn shì Táiběi Chēzhàn, nǐ yào zài nàlǐ xià chē ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5, xia4 yi1 zhan4 shi4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4, ni3 yao4 zai4 na4 li3 xia4 che1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. The next stop is Taipei Main Station. Do you want to get off there?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 다음 역은 타이베이 역이에요. 거기서 내리실 건가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "對，我要去台北車站。可是我要往回走，對不對？",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ yào qù Táiběi Chēzhàn. Kěshì wǒ yào wǎng huí zǒu, duì bù duì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 yao4 qu4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4. Ke3 shi4 wo3 yao4 wang3 hui2 zou3, dui4 bu4 dui4?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I need to go to Taipei Main Station. But I have to go back, right?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 타이베이 역에 가야 해요. 그런데 다시 돌아가야 하죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "對，你下車以後，到對面搭反方向的車，坐一站就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, nǐ xià chē yǐhòu, dào duìmiàn dā fǎn fāngxiàng de chē, zuò yī zhàn jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, ni3 xia4 che1 yi3 hou4, dao4 dui4 mian4 da1 fan3 fang1 xiang4 de5 che1, zuo4 yi1 zhan4 jiu4 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Yes. After you get off, go to the opposite platform and take the train in the opposite direction. One stop and you'll be there.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 내리신 후에 맞은편에서 반대 방향 차를 타시면 한 정거장이면 도착해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "好，謝謝你。我趕時間，希望還來得及。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxiè nǐ. Wǒ gǎn shíjiān, xīwàng hái láidejí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, xie4 xie4 ni3. Wo3 gan3 shi2 jian1, xi1 wang4 hai2 lai2 de5 ji2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. I'm in a hurry. I hope I can still make it.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 시간이 촉박해서 아직 늦지 않았으면 좋겠네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，下一班車三分鐘後到，你來得及。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, xià yī bān chē sān fēnzhōng hòu dào, nǐ láidejí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2, xia4 yi1 ban1 che1 san1 fen1 zhong1 hou4 dao4, ni3 lai2 de5 ji2.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. The next train arrives in three minutes. You'll make it.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요. 다음 차가 3분 후에 도착하니까 시간 안에 가실 수 있어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What happened to the passenger?",
          "question_ko": "승객에게 무슨 일이 일어났습니까?",
          "options_en": ["He got on the wrong train", "He missed his stop", "He lost his ticket"],
          "options_ko": ["잘못된 기차를 탔다", "정류장을 지나쳤다", "표를 잃어버렸다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the phrase '坐過站'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you missed your stop on the MRT. Tell the staff what happened and ask for help."
    },
    {
      "title": "轉乘問題",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "請問，我要去市政府站，要在哪裡轉車？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐngwèn, wǒ yào qù Shìzhèngfǔ Zhàn, yào zài nǎlǐ zhuǎn chē?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "qing3 wen4, wo3 yao4 qu4 Shi4 zheng4 fu3 Zhan4, yao4 zai4 na3 li3 zhuan3 che1?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I need to go to City Hall Station. Where should I transfer?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 시청역에 가려면 어디에서 환승해야 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "站務員",
          "text": "你現在在紅線，要到市政府站，需要在台北車站換藍線。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiànzài zài hóng xiàn, yào dào Shìzhèngfǔ Zhàn, xūyào zài Táiběi Chēzhàn huàn lán xiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 xian4 zai4 zai4 hong2 xian4, yao4 dao4 Shi4 zheng4 fu3 Zhan4, xu1 yao4 zai4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4 huan4 lan2 xian4.",
          "translation_en": "You're on the Red Line now. To get to City Hall Station, you need to transfer to the Blue Line at Taipei Main Station.",
          "translation_ko": "지금 홍선에 계신데, 시청역에 가시려면 타이베이 역에서 남선으로 갈아타셔야 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "好，那我要搭到台北車站，然後換藍線，對嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà wǒ yào dā dào Táiběi Chēzhàn, ránhòu huàn lán xiàn, duì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, na4 wo3 yao4 da1 dao4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4, ran2 hou4 huan4 lan2 xian4, dui4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, so I take the train to Taipei Main Station, then transfer to the Blue Line, right?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그럼 타이베이 역까지 타고 가서 남선으로 갈아타면 되죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "站務員",
          "text": "對，藍線是往頂埔的方向，你搭兩站就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, lán xiàn shì wǎng Dǐngpǔ de fāngxiàng, nǐ dā liǎng zhàn jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, lan2 xian4 shi4 wang3 Ding3 pu3 de5 fang1 xiang4, ni3 da1 liang3 zhan4 jiu4 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Yes. The Blue Line goes toward Dingpu. You'll be there in two stops.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 남선은 딩푸 방향이고 두 정거장이면 도착해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "乘客",
          "text": "謝謝你，我了解了。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè nǐ, wǒ liǎojiě le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie4 ni3, wo3 liao3 jie3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I understand.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 이해했어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which line does the passenger need to transfer to?",
          "question_ko": "승객은 어떤 노선으로 환승해야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Red Line", "Blue Line", "Green Line"],
          "options_ko": ["홍선", "남선", "녹선"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the transfer instructions and the line names.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You are at a station and need to go to a different station. Ask the staff how to transfer."
    },
    {
      "title": "走錯方向",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "路人",
          "text": "不好意思，我好像走錯路了。我要去公園，可是這裡是哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zǒu cuò lù le. Wǒ yào qù gōngyuán, kěshì zhèlǐ shì nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zou3 cuo4 lu4 le5. Wo3 yao4 qu4 gong1 yuan2, ke3 shi4 zhe4 li3 shi4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I think I went the wrong way. I need to go to the park, but where is this?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 길을 잘못 든 것 같아요. 공원에 가야 하는데 여기가 어디인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "路人乙",
          "text": "這裡是醫院前面，你走反方向了。公園在後面。",
          "pinyin": "Zhèlǐ shì yīyuàn qiánmiàn, nǐ zǒu fǎn fāngxiàng le. Gōngyuán zài hòumiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zhe4 li3 shi4 yi1 yuan4 qian2 mian4, ni3 zou3 fan3 fang1 xiang4 le5. Gong1 yuan2 zai4 hou4 mian4.",
          "translation_en": "This is in front of the hospital. You're going the wrong way. The park is behind you.",
          "translation_ko": "여기는 병원 앞이에요. 반대 방향으로 오셨어요. 공원은 뒤쪽에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "路人",
          "text": "啊，原來是這樣。那我應該回頭，直走嗎？",
          "pinyin": "À, yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Nà wǒ yīnggāi huítóu, zhí zǒu ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "a4, yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. Na4 wo3 ying1 gai1 hui2 tou2, zhi2 zou3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Oh, I see. So I should turn back and go straight?",
          "translation_ko": "아, 그렇군요. 그럼 뒤로 돌아서 직진하면 되나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "路人乙",
          "text": "對，你回頭直走，到紅綠燈左轉，公園就在右邊。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, nǐ huítóu zhí zǒu, dào hónglǜdēng zuǒ zhuǎn, gōngyuán jiù zài yòubiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, ni3 hui2 tou2 zhi2 zou3, dao4 hong2 lü4 deng1 zuo3 zhuan3, gong1 yuan2 jiu4 zai4 you4 bian1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes. Turn back and go straight. At the traffic light, turn left. The park will be on your right.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 뒤로 돌아서 직진하세요. 신호등에서 좌회전하면 공원이 오른쪽에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "路人",
          "text": "好，我知道了。謝謝你幫忙！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ bāngmáng!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, wo3 zhi1 dao4 le5. Xie4 xie4 ni3 bang1 mang2!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you for your help!",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠어요. 도와주셔서 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the park located?",
          "question_ko": "공원은 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["In front of the hospital", "Behind the hospital", "Next to the hospital"],
          "options_ko": ["병원 앞", "병원 뒤", "병원 옆"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the direction words like '回頭', '直走', '左轉'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You are lost and need to find a park. Ask a local for directions."
    }
  ]
}
